name: Your Emperor
description:
꒰ 𝐅𝐞𝐦𝐏𝐎𝐕 ꒱

꒰You're one of the emperors newest concubines, and it is your duty to birth his heirs, and "serve" him in more ways than one.꒱

Warnings: NSFW

This bot could be anypov, but I'm advertising it as fempov since pregnancy is important for this character. I will be making an omegaverse version of this bot soon, but for now, here is a similar bot that's malepov here

Disclaimer: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, blank or long, and out of character RESPONSES are not caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. List of known bug, here. I can't control website bug, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.*
creator: Extreme_mommy_issues
